body:
---
| **Barack Obama's inspiring hope for a better America has, without question, moved our country forward.**

[Join us and sign your name to thank our President for his remarkable leadership >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea4cc/e60883a/71b43ac9/144256b3/356367825/VEsH/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Thank-PresidentObama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.13_B2_7-years_X__F1_S3_C1__all")
* * *
Friends, President Obama's speech last night proved what we already knew to be true.

Not only has Obama successfully led us out of the Bush years of war and depression, his accomplishments these past seven years have been nothing short of stunning: [](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea4cc/e60883a/71b43ac9/144256b3/356367825/VEsE/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Thank-PresidentObama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.13_B2_7-years_X__F1_S3_C1__all")
But, despite seemingly insurmountable odds of Republican obstruction and baseless vitriol, President Barack Obama's legacy writes itself.

**And as he enters his final year, we are urging our fellow Democrats to join us and proudly thank our President for his historic leadership:**
**[SIGN YOUR NAME>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea4cc/e60883a/71b43ac9/144256b3/356367825/VEsF/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Thank-PresidentObama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.13_B2_7-years_X__F1_S3_C1__all")** [http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-PresidentObama](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea4cc/e60883a/71b43ac9/144256b3/356367825/VEsC/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Thank-PresidentObama?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.13_B2_7-years_X__F1_S3_C1__all")

Thanks for standing with us,

_BOLD PAC_

body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45794933:6NBVbyrNd:m:1:1349778030:DCEC3DC7C92C2AC37D006609CC444E40:r)
---
| | | | Peter, I hope you're as excited for tonight's debate as we are. As we're just a couple weeks away from the first caucuses and primaries, these debates are going to get more and more important. So I wanted to let you know what we're thinking about tonight, and what Marco's planning for.
You've probably noticed that the attacks on Marco over the past few weeks -- both from his Republican opponents and from Democrats terrified of facing him in a general -- have increased dramatically. They're misleading, laughable, or both.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45794934:6NBVbyrNd:m:1:1349778030:DCEC3DC7C92C2AC37D006609CC444E40:r)
---
| But we expect more of that tonight, in person. Marco has an optimistic conservative message and vision that no other candidate can match, and that's why they have to go on the attack. In response, Marco isn't going to get personal, but he will be drawing distinctions on some important policy questions. Other candidates are proposing news taxes, have inconsistent positions on foundational issues like life and the Second Amendment, or have voted in the past to weaken our military.
We're not afraid to debate those issues. In fact, we have to, because we don't just need a Republican in the White House next year -- we need a conservative Republican who will undo the damage done by Barack Obama.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45794934:6NBVbyrNd:m:1:1349778030:DCEC3DC7C92C2AC37D006609CC444E40:r)
---
| Marco's best-equipped to do that because he's the best candidate to take on Hillary Clinton (or Bernie!), and because he's spent years coming up with the conservative ideas we need to build a New American Century. These debates have been great opportunities to get that message out there, but they're not nearly enough: Our opponents will spend millions of dollars over the next few weeks attacking Marco, so [**please considering going here to make a Debate Day donation right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45794934:6NBVbyrNd:m:1:1349778030:DCEC3DC7C92C2AC37D006609CC444E40:r) Enjoy tonight, and thanks for your support, Alex ConantCommunications DirectorMarco Rubio for President
---

name: Ben Carson (iPhone)
subject: FWD: Can we add your name to Dr. Carson's list?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| |

Peter, Ryan just shared with me the email he sent to you yesterday.

It's debate day and I'm busy preparing, but I wanted to emphasize how crucial our Iowa Strike Force is to our campaign there, and to our strategy moving forward.

Before I take the stage tonight, my team will be sharing with me a list of everyone who donated to support this critical Get-Out-The-Vote effort, and I hope to see your name listed.

[Please make a donation of any amount now. Big or small it all adds up.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32854030:slF3dXyNX:m:1:876315805:5288DA70D528AB7C9F77C4B688597E31:r)

Thank you, and I hope you'll be watching the debate tonight at 9pm ET on the Fox Business Network.

-Ben

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

**From** : Ryan Rhodes
**Subject** : FWD: Can we add your name to Dr. Carson's list?
**Date** : January 13, 2016
**To** : Ben Carson

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32854030:slF3dXyNX:m:1:876315805:5288DA70D528AB7C9F77C4B688597E31:r)
---

Peter,

My name is Ryan Rhodes and I am the Iowa State Director for Dr. Carson.

**The Iowa Caucuses on February 1st are less than 3 weeks away. At that point, the process of choosing our next President will be officially underway.**

Dr. Carson is spending over half the month here in Iowa, and everywhere we go he's been greeted with incredible enthusiasm and overflow crowds. Don't believe the liberal media, momentum is coming at just the right time.

**But we have an enormous amount of grassroots work to do, and you are an integral part of our strategy for victory. Let me explain...

**Over the past few months, we've identified 100,000 Iowans most likely to support Dr. Carson, and if we can recruit roughly 37,000 of them, **we will win on February 1st.**

**To help, w****e've hired a 65-person IOWA STRIKE FORCE** responsible for recruiting, training and deploying teams of volunteers that will be knocking on doors, making phone calls, and convincing Iowans to caucus for Dr. Carson. And then they'll be following up with more calls and visits.
**Here's where you come in...

[We need you to make an urgent grassroots donation to get our Iowa Strike Force the support they need. Before Thursday's 9pm ET Fox Business debate, the campaign will be showing Ben a list of everyone who helped and I want to ensure your name is included.

And for a donation of $25 or more, we'll even send you a copy of Ben's short, easy-to-read book, _My Life_.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32854030:slF3dXyNX:m:1:876315805:5288DA70D528AB7C9F77C4B688597E31:r)
**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32854030:slF3dXyNX:m:1:876315805:5288DA70D528AB7C9F77C4B688597E31:r)
---
Peter, we must win in Iowa. When we do, we'll build momentum to take us to New Hampshire, South Carolina, Nevada and beyond. We will prove that the American people are yearning and ready to reclaim power from the professional political class.

**We've built a movement of millions. Now it's time to show what we can do. Now is the time when it really counts.**

America was supposed to be a land of citizen-statesmen. Government wasn't meant to be involved in every aspect of our lives.

Ben is running for President because he's concerned about the future we are leaving our children and grandchildren, and I believe that he can get us back on the right track.

**[If, like me, you believe in Ben and his vision for a more hopeful America, I ask you to dig deep and donate to support our Iowa Strike Force now. We cannot do this without you.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32854030:slF3dXyNX:m:1:876315805:5288DA70D528AB7C9F77C4B688597E31:r)

**Thank you, and God Bless America.

Sincerely,

Ryan Rhodes
Iowa State Director
Ben Carson for President

Dear Patriot,

Will you let them get away with it?

Will you let the our national media and the
Republican establishment succeed in barring me from tonight's
debate without paying a price?

Patriot, the more voters I talk to, the more
outrage I hear at Fox Business' decision to arbitrarily exclude
you and me from tonight's debate.

That's why I'm counting on you to help send
the message that you're not happy with this latest attempt to
blackout my campaign. And if possible, please agree to your most
generous contribution of $100, $50, $25 or $10 to help me go
around our national media and go straight to the voters.

watching the GOP establishment and the national media continually

name: Rand Paul
subject: Let's show them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
The Washington machine has really shown
itself this time.
I will not be featured in tonight's main
debate.
In fact, I will not be participating in
either of the debates tonight.
The media just wouldn't allow it.
Though the polls show me in a steady 5th
place, ahead of Bush, Christie, and Kasich (who will be in the
debate), they've decided they would rather choose winners and
losers.
They don't care what the voters want, they
have their own agenda.
And that agenda seems to be shutting down my
campaign.
Perhaps I shouldn't be surprised after
watching the GOP establishment and the national media
continuously attempt to slam the door on my dad's supporters in
2008 and 2012.
But I think you know by now, I'm not going to
let them quiet this campaign without a fight, and I don't think
you will either, Patriot.
Will you help show the establishment and the
mainstream media that the liberty movement will not be silenced?
If you can contribute just $25 today to our
Fight The Media Blackout moneybomb, we can send a big message.
We have a top tier campaign. Over 1,000
precinct captains in Iowa and a 500-membership leadership team in
New Hampshire. We've proven time and time again that this
campaign is here to stay.
Let's show them one more time.
Stand with me today.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul
P.S. I have plans to discuss the important
topics America needs to hear, debate or no debate. Stay tuned for
more information about our social media townhall tonight.

name: Rand Paul
subject: The Revolution Will Not Be Televised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

Want to see a bunch of candidates fighting
over how best to destroy our Fourth Amendment, or start World War
III?

After ignoring the latest polls, and unfairly
barring me from tonight's debate, I'm afraid that's about all
tonight's Republican debate has to offer the American people.

The media has decided our revolution will not
be televised. And don't think we should reward our media for so
blatantly attempting to skew this presidential race.

Tonight, why don't you turn off your TV and
tune into a REAL discussion about how we can defeat the
Washington machine and restore our constitutional liberties.

Tonight at 9 p.m. EST, my campaign will be
hosting a National Town Hall, and I'd love it if you'd "attend."
It's the ONLY place you'll hear a presidential candidate giving a
full-throated endorsement of the ideas of liberty this country
was founded on.

In the next few hours, we'll be sending more
details.

But I wanted to give you the "heads up" right
away.

Make no mistake, Patriot.

Our campaign is growing by the day. Our
message is spreading like wildfire in the early states.

It's why the national media is going all-out
to silence us.

Don't let them get away with it.

Please tune in tonight. And if possible,
please agree to your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or
even $10 right away.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

| Friend,

I told you it was going to happen, and last night it did.

And today, I need your support and prayers more than I ever have.

Please let me explain: Last night _**The New York Times**_ wrote a disgraceful story - placing it on their front page above the fold - _in a shameful attempt to not only effect tonight's debate but also change the ultimate course of the 2016 election._

That's right, just before the most important presidential debate of the election - and with less than 18 days until the first votes are counted in Iowa - **_The New York Times_ made the strategic decision to dictate the outcome of this election by launching an all-out assault on Heidi and me.**
_
I'm preparing to fight back like never before, but I cannot come up short if I am going to go up against The New York Times and win..._

Friend, this could prove to be the most important day of the campaign, and I need you by my side.

So before I go any further - I need to ask you to stand with me right now...[**before tonight's debate will you go and make an emergency donation?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32877682:W_1A0XyNP:m:1:1104269936:31C15CD3908359C964EC8023490051B5:r)

I'm counting on you to make an emergency donation to support my campaign and help me fight back against _The Times_ shameless attacks. **Below, I've asked my staff to place a special, emergency donate button so you can contribute securely:**

[** EMERGENCY DONATE $5 »**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32877683:W_1A0XyNP:m:1:1104269936:31C15CD3908359C964EC8023490051B5:r)

You see, it wasn't enough for the liberal, media elite when the _Washington Post_ attacked and mocked my daughters - drawing them as monkeys on a leash.

Now, _The New York Times_ has decided the only way to derail my campaign is to blatantly mislead the American people, distract them from the real issues facing our nation, and attack Heidi and me personally.

It is disgraceful.

**That's why I'm reaching out to you today with a personal request.**

You and I have already faced brutal attacks since I announced my campaign, some from Hillary and some from my opponents, but every time we have gotten stronger.

Now the liberal, media elite are truly desperate to discredit and destroy me - by any means necessary. **[Will you make an emergency donation?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32877684:W_1A0XyNP:m:1:1104269936:31C15CD3908359C964EC8023490051B5:r)**

I know it's a lot to ask, but you are one of my best supporters and that's why I'm turning to you first. If I can't count on you, I have nowhere else to turn.

[**Even the smallest amount will make a difference.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32877685:W_1A0XyNP:m:1:1104269936:31C15CD3908359C964EC8023490051B5:r)

Heidi and I are so very grateful for your continued support.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

body:
| Friend,

I've been working hard to prepare for today's debate in Charleston, SC. And as I do, I am reminded of the encouragement, support and enthusiasm that you have brought to my campaign. Friend, thank you. America is a great country. Will you donate $25 to keep my message strong?](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum%3Fsc%3Dquickword&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=quickword&n=1)** I will fight against the Washington Elites in the debate tonight -- head on. ---

Peter, _Who else but Joe_ : as news broke that 10 U.S. sailors were detained by Iran, the Admiral got a call from MSNBC to go immediately on air and discuss what the situation "on the ground" might be like in the Persian Gulf where Joe operated. Joe then got off the phone and reviewed this week's video of one of his former constituents - a young woman immigrant - who was days away from losing the financial aid package she was offered by the University of Chicago until Joe got her stalled Green Card application out of a processing center in Texas. | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17193c7/3476a20e/c464504/27449749/35806770/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0114FBb1&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")

---|---
_Who else but Joe_ : while in the city of Reading presenting one of the 13 parts of his domestic policy plan for PA working families, the local TV station covering his immigration policy event asked him to also speak as a foreign policy expert and Joe explained how we need an "incident at sea" agreement with Iran like we had with the Soviet Union and China (which Joe proposed while an Admiral in command in the Persian Gulf.)
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17193c7/3476a20e/c464504/27449776/35806770/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0114FBb2&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")

---
_Who else but Joe_ : the people of Pennsylvania and the entire nation need leaders who can and have credibly shaped policy, both domestic and foreign - while also taking care of individual constituents. Joe has spent his entire career in public service - 31 years in the U.S. Navy plus 4 years in Congress - and then turned down lobbying jobs to instead teach at our colleges and universities. Help Joe serve us again today, by contributing what you can today!
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17193c7/3476a20e/c464504/27449774/35806770/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0114FBb3&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Now a Clinton super PAC is attacking us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Here is what I believe: the greed of the pharmaceutical and health care industries in this country is killing Americans. It is a national disgrace that, despite great gains made under the Affordable Care Act, 29 million of our neighbors are still without care.
That is why I am, frankly, a bit surprised that with less than three weeks to go before the Iowa caucuses, the Clinton campaign is attacking our belief that health care must be recognized as a right, not a privilege, for every man, woman and child in our country. We cannot wait to realize that goal, and the best way to get there is a Medicare-for-all, single-payer system.
**Yesterday, one of Hillary Clinton's several super PACs took aim at us,** saying our plan would "require tax increases on working families."
It would be a terrible setback for our shared values and for our movement to reform a corrupt political system if we lost because a super PAC scared voters into thinking our plan would take away people's coverage or cost them more money. Help make sure that doesn't happen.
[**Please make a $3 contribution to put an end to these attacks and help us win in Iowa.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a3c/43f17890/450d6667/620f27f8/3420027163/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie_under_attack?refcode=em160114full")
Under my plan, we will lower the cost of health care for the typical family by nearly $5,000 a year. It is unfair to say simply how much more a program will cost without letting people know we are doing away with the cost of private insurance and that the middle class will be paying substantially less for health care under a single-payer system than Hillary Clinton's program.
Attacking the cost of the plan without acknowledging the bottom-line savings is the way Republicans have attacked this idea for decades.
Taking that approach in a Democratic primary undermines the hard work of so many who have fought to guarantee health care as a right in this country, and it hurts our prospects for achieving that goal in the near future.
**Fight back against the super PACs that have attacked our campaign, and help deliver a victory in Iowa for our political revolution. Make a contribution here:**
**[https://go.berniesanders.com/victory-in-iowa](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a3c/43f17890/450d6667/620f27f8/3420027163/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie_under_attack?refcode=em160114full")**
Real change comes about when large numbers of ordinary Americans speak, vote and get involved in the democratic process. If we stand together, we win. If we are divided, the big-money interests win. And we have a real shot to deliver a big victory in the fight for health care as a right for all Americans in this campaign.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute $3](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a3c/43f17890/450d6667/620f27f8/3420027163/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie_under_attack?refcode=em160114full")**

name: Christina Reynolds, HillaryClinton.com
subject: 3 things about 2 polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
These polls show us losing Iowa - here's what you need to know. | Friend --

This week, two new polls came out that show us losing Iowa.

**[Don't let it happen. Chip in $1 right now to show you're not afraid of a fight.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQ0NzA5NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxNjg4NTE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

There are three things I want you to know about those numbers:

(1) We always knew this would happen. From day one, Hillary was ready to fight hard in a competitive primary and earn every last vote. Polls always tighten -- and nothing is going to change that as we get closer to the caucus.

(2) Polls might fuel our fire, but they don't affect our strategy. We can't risk being outworked and conceding this election to the Republicans. We'll keep knocking doors, making calls, and showing up every single day even more determined to elect Hillary and make a difference for the families she's fighting for.

(3) Even though Sanders is outspending us on TV, I truly believe we will win Iowa because of what this team is capable of. That means you.

Bernie's counting on momentum to take him across the finish line. Hillary's counting on you.

**Are you with her? Chip in $1 now:** | [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQ0NzA5NDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIxNjg4NTE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

clean_body: These polls show us losing Iowa - here's what you need to know. | Friend -- This week, two new polls came out that show us losing Iowa. There are three things I want you to know about those numbers: (1) We always knew this would happen. From day one, Hillary was ready to fight hard in a competitive primary and earn every last vote. Polls always tighten -- and nothing is going to change that as we get closer to the caucus. (2) Polls might fuel our fire, but they don't affect our strategy. We can't risk being outworked and conceding this election to the Republicans. We'll keep knocking doors, making calls, and showing up every single day even more determined to elect Hillary and make a difference for the families she's fighting for. (3) Even though Sanders is outspending us on TV, I truly believe we will win Iowa because of what this team is capable of. That means you. Bernie's counting on momentum to take him across the finish line. Hillary's counting on you. Are you with her? subject: I will not be banned

body:
Dear Patriot,

I may have been excluded from the debate
tonight -- but that doesn't mean I'm staying quiet.

For years I've been fighting for a more
diverse party that promotes a diversity of opinion and dissent.

And it's clear the media and the Washington
machine do not stand with me.

Even though I met the arbitrary polling
standards set by the media, I will not be welcomed onstage
tonight to present my ideas for a bigger, better GOP.

It might not be televised, but you can bet I
will speak out on the issues that matter tonight. Please check
out the video I recorded to tell you more about my plans tonight.

Without my voice there will be no voice for
those who truly believe in fiscal conservatism.

Without my voice, the liberty wing of the our
party will wonder if they should look elsewhere, outside of the
party, for representation.

I refuse to be banned. I refused to be
silenced. I will continue to take my message to the people.

Stand up and join me tonight for a national
town hall at 9pm on Twitter.
Turn the tv off. Choose liberty, unfiltered
and direct from the source.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Rand Paul
subject: What we saw tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

The media and the Washington machine wanted
to silence our message.
They blocked us out of the debate, despite
our qualifying poll numbers, and they thought we'd walk away in
silence.
We didn't.
Tonight we hosted our own forum to talk about
the real issues. And guess what? People listened.
The Twitter buzz surrounding our untelevised
revolution must have the media shaking in their boots.
They can take away air time, but they cannot
silence the liberty movement.
This is proof.

We even had someone at the Wall Street
Journal comment on it!
I may have been excluded from the debate
tonight -- but that couldn't stop me from bringing liberty to the
people.
What we saw tonight just echoed what we've
been saying all week. This campaign has the grassroots support to
succeed - with or without the support of the media.
I'm so glad you all could join me to get our
message out.
I've been fighting for a more diverse party
that promotes a diversity of opinion and dissent. And while it's
clear the media and the Washington machine do not stand with me,
it's even more clear that with supporters like you I have the
strength to stand against their arbitrary rules and status quo.
We set a $250,000 goal to help us fight the
media blackout.
We made a big step in the right direction
tonight - will you help push us over the top and send an even
bigger message to the media?
Chipping in $25 would make a real difference.
Let's prove our strength. We won't be
silenced.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

| Dear Friend,

If you just watched the debate -- you saw them come at me from every angle.

**Every negative attack line invented by the _The New York Times_ and _The Washington Post_ was repeated by Donald Trump and Marco Rubio tonight** \-- doing Hillary's bidding.

Friend, tonight is the most important night of my campaign, and right now, [**I am personally asking if you'll be part of it.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32885060:s0JcI_y7N:m:1:1104269936:95786BF25506F904A98F0A17F9059049:r)

**The world is watching to see how I fare against the barrage of attacks from my opponents and the liberal media...** like _The New York Times_.

My opponents and the liberal media elites decided their best strategy to defeat me was through continued personal attacks on me and my family -- repeating again and again their misleading, distorted attacks.

As you may have read by now, _The New York Times_ published a disgraceful story last night. It was an attempted hatchet job aimed at misleading and distracting the American people in a shameful attempt to ensure my defeat in tonight's debate.

Others on the stage with me tonight thought their best strategy was to question my citizenship -- even quoting one of Hillary Clinton's biggest supporters -- in a last ditch attempt to derail my winning campaign.

**Tonight, more time was spent on misleading and false attacks, and it only benefited Hillary Clinton at the great expense of the American people.**

But as you saw tonight, I fought back with everything I had -- with the truth on our side -- and we won.

If you agree with me that _The New York Times_ and the _The Washington Post_ are doing the bidding of Hillary Clinton and the national Democrats -- join my campaign tonight.

[**Click here to make an urgent contribution to my campaign.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32885060:s0JcI_y7N:m:1:1104269936:95786BF25506F904A98F0A17F9059049:r)

You see: _I'm not a BILLIONAIRE, and the special interest lobbyist and Washington Cartel are not supporting me_ \-- they're all supporting my opponents.

So, I'm counting on you Friend.

**[Can I ask you tonight to make an urgent gift of at least $25?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32885060:s0JcI_y7N:m:1:1104269936:95786BF25506F904A98F0A17F9059049:r)**

[**OR, if you can afford more, will you make an urgent gift of $100 or even $500?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32885059:s0JcI_y7N:m:1:1104269936:95786BF25506F904A98F0A17F9059049:r)

If you want to defend the U.S. Constitution rather than see who can launch the most attacks...I'm your candidate.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: Official Bernie 2016
subject: Visualize winning Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Dear Team,
Momentum is on our side: new polls coming out of Iowa consistently show Bernie gaining ground. Victory is now within reach.
But in order to win, we need you to double down on your commitment to attend local voter contact events -- and we're going to make this email a little longer than usual to explain why.
**Together, Bernie supporters are building the biggest voter contact machine in the history of American politics, and it's powered by one thing: you.**
Here's how it works. Bernie supporters like you call likely voters in key early voting states like Iowa and Nevada to find out who is already supporting Bernie, and who still needs to be convinced.
We then feed that information to on-the-ground staff, who make sure Bernie supporters turn out on Election Day, and persuade undecided voters to support Bernie.
The more calls that supporters like you make, the more time our field staff can spend on the things that win elections: turnout and persuasion.
There are phone banks and organizing events happening this weekend near you. If you haven't yet volunteered with Bernie, now is the time! If you have been volunteering, this is the time to step up your efforts and bring your friends.
**[Old Town Alexandria ( Close to King Street Metro) Phone Banking for Bernie Sanders:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4rfzt)
Friday, January 15th in Alexandria **
**[Hyattsville for Bernie Phone Bank:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4rg3p)
Saturday, January 16th in Hyattsville **
**[McLean for Bernie Phone Bank:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4rq3h)
Sunday, January 17th in McLean **
**[Arlington for Bernie Phone Bank:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4rlt7)
Monday, January 18th in Arlington **
**[Phone Banking in Rockville, MD:](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4rptj\(http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode)
Tuesday, January 19th in Rockville **
It's pretty simple, but it needs people like you to make it happen. If we can talk to enough voters, Bernie can win. Because when voters hear Bernie's message, they support him.
On February 1, Iowans will cast the first votes in the Democratic presidential primary. Volunteers across the country are working to help secure wins in the early voting states and then organize in the Super Tuesday states to seal the deal and help make Bernie the Democratic nominee for president.
This is why we need you to sign up for as many voter contact shifts as possible. Bernie needs us right now. Thank you for stepping up.
In solidarity,
Becky Bond
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a2d/43f17890/4563c131/620f2de9/731632727/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a2d/43f17890/4563c131/620f2d96/731632727/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a2d/43f17890/4563c131/620f2d97/731632727/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a2d/43f17890/4563c131/620f2d94/731632727/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
